examples: I can't even eat a baby conch!
When she returned with the conch, they were waiting and watching.
Monks in orange robes offer flowers and food to the gods and produce haunting sounds on conch shells.
There is little agriculture, though the territory is home to the world's only conch farm.
By the closing stages, it was back to bring-your-own food, blowing conch shells and a sense of fun.
